title: Warm Syrian Tomato Flatbread
description: A comforting Syrian flatbread infused with ripe confit tomatoes and fresh basil, served warm for a satisfying lunch or dinner.
instructions: In a large bowl combine the flour, salt, sumac, and black pepper.
Add warm water and olive oil gradually, mixing until a sticky dough forms.
Turn the dough onto a floured surface and knead for about 5 minutes until smooth.
Divide the dough into four equal portions and roll each into a thin oval.
Heat a nonstick skillet over medium heat and cook each flatbread for 2 minutes on each side until golden brown.
Spread a thin layer of confited tomatoes on each flatbread, then scatter basil leaves on top.
Serve the flatbreads warm, optionally drizzling a little extra olive oil.
Enjoy the aromatic, umami-packed dish as a hearty dinner.
